goal: Provision or conclusively discover the strict external Gemma model cache required by the exported Docker runtime, then collect /healthz, /agents/{agent_id}/run, and /v1/chat/completions evidence with a read-only MIB_MODEL_CACHE_DIR mount if the cache is available. Do not fake model files, do not bundle base-model weights into the repo or image, and do not claim M6-RC GO unless endpoint evidence actually passes.
head: caf9c0f
blocked_scope: Runtime, loader, verifier, schema, API, DB, worker, FE, or benchmark changes
Bundling base-model weights in git, export artifacts, or Docker image
Creating fake strict-cache files or weakening hash/size validation
M6-RC GO/sign-off changes before endpoint transcripts pass
allowed_edit_paths_scope_note: This gate records strict model cache discovery/provisioning and exported Docker endpoint evidence only. It may write large model files only outside the repo, under an explicit external cache path such as /tmp/mib-strict-model-cache or an existing user-provided cache root.
external_runtime_paths: existing user-provided model cache roots if discovered
required_evidence: Strict catalog-required Gemma cache_subdir and required file list
Search result for existing matching cache roots
HF token/terms availability check without exposing secret values
If network/cache provisioning is possible, downloader command result and required file hash verification
If strict cache exists, Docker run with read-only MIB_MODEL_CACHE_DIR mount
If strict cache exists, HTTP transcript for /healthz
If strict cache exists, HTTP transcript for /agents/{agent_id}/run
If strict cache exists, HTTP transcript for /v1/chat/completions
If strict cache remains unavailable, concrete blocker with exact missing external condition
executed_verification_commands: HF token environment presence check without printing secret values
PYTHONDONTWRITEBYTECODE=1 PYTHONPATH=. MIB_OFFLINE=1 ./.venv/bin/python -c '<ensure_model google/gemma-2b-it cuda runtime_evidence>'
HF credential file presence check without printing secret values

failed_verification_commands.reason: Sandbox DNS resolution failed; rerun with network access succeeded and returned HTTP 401 GatedRepo.

warnings: Gemma is gated by license terms; do not bypass terms or fabricate cache files.
This evidence gate does not change product code and does not make M6-RC GO unless endpoint evidence actually passes.
Large model files must stay outside git and outside exported images.

phase_notes.plan: Open a scoped evidence contract for strict model cache discovery/provisioning and exported Docker endpoint evidence.
phase_notes.audit: Focused read completed for strict catalog, model cache service, runtime cache validation, loader behavior, M6 export acceptance, and prior Docker evidence.
phase_notes.build: Collected strict catalog verification, local cache discovery, HF credential availability, offline model-cache miss, disk, Docker image availability, and HF gated access evidence.
phase_notes.check: Strict catalog verification passed. No valid strict Gemma cache or HF credential exists. Hugging Face returned HTTP 401 GatedRepo for unauthenticated Gemma access.
phase_notes.done: Evidence recorded in artifacts/review/strict_model_cache_evidence.md. Endpoint success evidence remains blocked by missing authenticated Gemma access or user-provided strict cache.

pabcd.approved_scope: Strict model cache discovery/provisioning evidence, exported Docker runtime endpoint evidence if cache exists, and operational docs/artifacts.
pabcd.blocked_scope: No product code changes, no fake cache, no bundled model weights, no release GO changes.
pabcd.phase_completion_git_policy: When verification/evidence commands finish, stage, commit, and push this phase.
pabcd.plan: Create scoped strict model cache/runtime evidence contract.
pabcd.audit: Focused read completed for strict catalog, model cache service, runtime cache validation, loader behavior, M6 export acceptance, and prior Docker evidence.
pabcd.build: Collected strict model cache discovery/provisioning evidence.
pabcd.check: Required evidence proves strict cache is unavailable in this environment and Gemma access is gated without credentials.
pabcd.done: Stage, commit, and push this NOT_GO evidence phase.
